narrative: Oil prices ease as Iran suggests diplomatic efforts continue, cooling the geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY holds at 162.41 as the 275bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor. Gold higher +0.10%; equities -1.01%; DXY +0.01%; VIX 18.5. USD/JPY moderate put skew in 25d RR (-1.37) and 3.7pt VRP signal hedging demand against carry unwinds. Watch ECB Rate Decision July 23 for EUR/USD direction.
